name: Thistle
description: Spiky thistle heads on stout bases, re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 34%; bottom: 8%; width: 32%; height: 42%; border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 28%; top: 12%; width: 44%; height: 44%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 60% 30%, 92% 18%, 68% 48%, 100% 60%, 64% 64%, 72% 100%, 50% 72%, 28% 100%, 36% 64%, 0 60%, 32% 48%, 8% 18%, 40% 30%); clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 60% 30%, 92% 18%, 68% 48%, 100% 60%, 64% 64%, 72% 100%, 50% 72%, 28% 100%, 36% 64%, 0 60%, 32% 48%, 8% 18%, 40% 30%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
